title: agrostis curtisii var. flava
intro: Agrostis curtisii var. flava, also known as yellow bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the British Isles. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis curtisii var. flava include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
